name: vespera
description: **FastAPI-like developer experience for Rust.** Zero-config OpenAPI 3.1 generation for Axum.
author: devfive

scripts.prelint: cargo clippy -- -D warnings && cargo fmt --check && cargo check
scripts.build: bun run -F ./apps/front build && bun run -F ./apps/admin build
scripts.prelint:fix: cargo clippy --fix --allow-dirty && cargo fmt && cargo check
